user_goal: B027 Real Data Snapshot Foundation — 为 Stream 1 Real Data 接入打地基。把 Tiingo Starter $10/月 数据源接入 backend Repository 抽象层 + 加 cost guard ($10 USD/月 cap + 80% threshold alert + BudgetExceeded raise) + log + GitHub Secret TIINGO_API_KEY 注入 .env.production。不做 backfill / 不切 sleeve / 不动 strategy 代码（B028+ 责任）。Stream 1.A / Phase 1 (implementation-path-2026-05.md §4 第二个 batch，Phase 1 起点)。本批次 3 features：(F001) Tiingo adapter + SnapshotLoader Repository 抽象 + PriceBar dataclass + httpx + 5xx/rate limit 重试 + health_check + pytest ≥10；(F002) MonthlyBudgetGuard + BudgetExceeded + tiingo_budget_log SQLite 表 + alembic migration + cost_guard 集成 TiingoSnapshotLoader + pytest ≥10；(F003) Codex L1 + L2 真 VM 验收 + GitHub Secret TIINGO_API_KEY 注入验证 + smoke API test + signoff。**永久硬边界 100% 继承 v0.9.28：** AI 5 子条 + 系统层 + UI 层 + 数据 CI 层 + 产品边界。新增产品边界 (f) Tiingo API key 仅 backend 用永不入前端/build/log + (g) 月预算 cap $10 USD enforced。决策矩阵（2026-05-26 含 vendor reselect 用户已批）：轻批次范围 (Tiingo adapter + Repository + cost guard，不含 backfill) / API key 方案 A (.env.production + GitHub Secrets，与 B021 OAuth/DB 同机制) / 不在本批次做 cross-check fallback (B028 时接 yfinance) / 数据源原 Polygon.io rebrand 为 Massive.com 引发 vendor 稳定性疑虑后改 Tiingo (独立 fintech 老牌 vendor 2014 起未 rebrand)。B026 banner 仍 enable 显示 不破。F001+F002 generator，F003 codex。预估 1-2 个轻量批次。
generator_handoff: B027 F001 done at commit 11206ac. New module workbench_api/data/ (__init__.py + snapshot_loader.py ABC+PriceBar + tiingo_loader.py with httpx + Token auth + 5xx/429/network retry+backoff + PIT clamp + adjClose→adj_close map + _HttpClient Protocol injection point for tests). Settings.py + safety allowlist add TIINGO_API_KEY (typed str | None default None). New workbench/backend/.env.example documents full backend env surface. workbench/deploy/scripts/deploy.sh adds post-env-load TIINGO_API_KEY check (exit 66 with remediation message if loaded EnvironmentFile lacks the key; tolerates dev rehearsal without EnvironmentFile). +17 pytest specs: 4 in test_snapshot_loader.py (ABC instantiation refused + PriceBar frozen + slots + field shape) + 13 in test_tiingo_loader.py (missing-key raise + env resolve + payload parse + 5xx retry + 429 retry + retry exhaust + future-to-date clamp + missing field ValueError + non-list ValueError + network error retry + health_check happy + 401 false + multi-ticker 1:1). Gates: backend pytest 258 passed 2 skipped (was 241+2) / ruff clean / mypy clean / trade pytest 727 unchanged / frontend vitest 166 unchanged. trade/data/loader.py fixture untouched; strategy/Master Portfolio/Recs/Risk/Frontend/DB schema unchanged. No Tiingo SDK introduced. F002 next: cost_guard.py (MonthlyBudgetGuard cap=10.0 + BudgetExceeded) + repositories/budget_log.py (tiingo_budget_log SQLite + CRUD) + alembic migration 0003_add_tiingo_budget_log_table.py + TiingoSnapshotLoader.__init__ extended with guard param + integration tests +10 specs.

session_notes.planner: 2026-05-26 B026 done 收尾 + B027 启动 + vendor reselect 修订一并完成。(1) B026 由 Codex 在 2026-05-26 完成 final signoff (a2e62a4)，2 fix-rounds production-only React event edge 解决（vanilla DOM fallback 双路径）。Codex L2 在 c4221d0 上确认 production HEAD == main HEAD == c4221d0，focused L2 dismiss flow 6/6 PASS。(2) v0.9.29 评估：用户决定『暂不沉淀，等二例再记账』；Planner 在 framework/proposed-learnings.md 加 v0.9.20 BL-060 模式历史注释。未来 Phase 3 Home/Reports 改造再撞同类 local-pass-prod-fail UI 互动问题时由当时 Planner 合并沉淀为 v0.9.29。(3) B027 启动初版选 Polygon.io Starter $30/月 (commit 88ccf89)。(4) **Vendor reselect (2026-05-26)**：用户访问 polygon.io 时发现 301 永久 redirect 到 massive.com (2026 Q1 rebrand)；APIs 继续兼容但 vendor 稳定性疑虑。Planner 重新评估 7 候选 vendor 后用户选定方案 B：**Tiingo Starter $10/月 (独立 fintech 老牌 2014 起未 rebrand) + yfinance 免费 cross-check (留 B028 接入)**。Massive 保留为备选。月预算节省 $19 (¥130/月)。(5) 修订内容：data-source-evaluation §3.2 / §6.1 / §6.2 / §8 主选改 Tiingo + 加 2026-05-26 reselect 历史注释；B027 spec 全文 Polygon → Tiingo (BASE_URL https://api.tiingo.com/tiingo + Authorization 'Token {key}' + endpoint /tiingo/daily/{ticker}/prices)；类名 PolygonSnapshotLoader → TiingoSnapshotLoader；文件 polygon_loader.py → tiingo_loader.py；env var POLYGON_API_KEY → TIINGO_API_KEY；表名 polygon_budget_log → tiingo_budget_log；cap $30 → $10 USD；alembic migration add_tiingo_budget_log_table；Tiingo JSON schema adjClose 字段适配；增 §12 Vendor 备选记录列出决策痕迹。(6) features.json + progress.json + project-status.md 同步更新；backlog.json 不动；framework/proposed-learnings.md 注释已加（commit 88ccf89 时）。(7) status 仍 building (混合批次：F001+F002 generator + F003 codex)。(8) 下一会话 Generator 起 F001：SnapshotLoader 抽象 (vendor-agnostic) + TiingoSnapshotLoader 实现 + httpx + 5xx/rate limit 重试 + pytest ≥10。关键注意点：① 不引入 Tiingo Python SDK (避 vendor lock-in，httpx 直接 REST，rebrand-proof)；② TIINGO_API_KEY 走 os.environ 缺时 raise RuntimeError 含修复指引；③ Authorization header 'Token {api_key}' (Tiingo 鉴权)；④ Tiingo JSON 响应 schema: date/open/high/low/close/adjClose/volume；⑤ rate limit 60 req/hour (比 Polygon 5/min 宽松)；⑥ deploy.sh pre-flight check 不阻塞 B021-B026 部署仅 B027 deploy 时验；⑦ F002 时加 tiingo_budget_log + alembic + cost_guard 集成；⑧ GitHub Secret TIINGO_API_KEY **已预配置完成**（2026-05-26 用户主动告知）；Generator F001/F002 实施无需中断等待 user 协助；F002 alembic migration 可直接走完整流程；F003 L2 可直接验证 .env.production 含 TIINGO_API_KEY；⑨ B026 banner 仍 enable 不破。(9) 后续路径按 implementation-path §4 顺序：B028 (Stream 1.B 历史价格 backfill + 新增 yfinance_loader.py cross-check) → B029 (Stream 1.C 财务 SEC EDGAR；Tiingo 不含 fundamentals 所以 SEC EDGAR 是原计划) → B030 (Stream 1.D 全 sleeve 切真 + reports/ fixture vs real 对比) → 里程碑 A Layer 0→1 → B030 done by acceptance 修改 .env.production NEXT_PUBLIC_SYNTHETIC_DATA_BANNER=false 让 B026 banner 自然下线。
session_notes.generator: 2026-05-26 B027 F001 完成（commit 11206ac，9 files +767 行）。按 spec §4 §5 直译：(a) 新 workbench_api/data/ 模块带 __init__ boundary docstring（『only place that imports external market-data HTTP API』）；(b) snapshot_loader.py: SnapshotLoader ABC（fetch_daily_bars + health_check）+ frozen/slots PriceBar dataclass（含 PIT semantics docstring）；(c) tiingo_loader.py: TiingoSnapshotLoader 走 httpx；TIINGO_API_KEY 从 kwarg→env 解析，缺失时 raise RuntimeError 含 GitHub repo secret 修复指引；Authorization 'Token {key}'；retry policy MAX_RETRIES=3 / BACKOFF_BASE=0.5 / CAP=8s 对 5xx + 429 + 网络错；4xx 非 429 fail-fast；401/403 内部用 _AuthFailure RuntimeError，health_check 转 False；PIT 把 to_date clamp 到 today；_parse_bar 把 Tiingo adjClose 映射到 adj_close，缺字段 raise ValueError 含 ticker + 缺失字段名 + 实际 keys。(d) 注入点 _HttpClient Protocol 让单测 stub 不需 subclass httpx.Client。(e) settings.py 加 TIINGO_API_KEY 到 ALLOWED_ENV_VARS + Settings 字段（str | None default None，process boot 仍 vendor-free）；safety test_settings_env_allowlist EXPECTED_ALLOWLIST 同步。(f) 新 workbench/backend/.env.example 模板含全 9 个 env var；TIINGO_API_KEY 节注明 GitHub Secret 注入 systemd EnvironmentFile 路径 + Tiingo dashboard 链接 + 'backend-only secret never log' 边界提醒。(g) deploy.sh 在 env 加载后加 TIINGO_API_KEY 缺失 check exit=66 + stderr 修复指引；当 EnvironmentFile 不可读（local rehearsal）时 skip check 不阻塞 B021-B026 风格 deploy。(h) tests +17: test_snapshot_loader.py × 4（ABC TypeError + PriceBar frozen + slots + 8 字段 shape）+ test_tiingo_loader.py × 13（missing-key raise + env-var resolve + payload parse 含 lowercase URL + 5xx retry then success backoff exp [0.5,1.0] + 429 retry + 3 次 5xx 耗尽 raise httpx.HTTPStatusError + 未来 to_date clamp to today + missing adjClose ValueError 含 ticker + non-list payload ValueError 含 'non-list' + ConnectError network retry + health_check 200→True + 401→False + 3 ticker 顺序 fetch 一对一 URL）；用 _StubClient + _StubResponse 离线 mock。(i) 本地 gates 全绿：backend pytest 258 passed 2 skipped（243 baseline + 17 new = 260；spec ≥10 floor ✓）/ ruff 0 / mypy 0（用 Protocol 解决 _StubClient 与 httpx.Client 不兼容）/ trade pytest 727 / frontend vitest 166 unchanged。(j) Boundary：trade/data/loader.py 不动、strategy/Master Portfolio/Recs/Risk/Frontend/DB schema 不动、未引入 Tiingo SDK 走 httpx direct REST rebrand-proof。(k) 下一个 sprint F002：cost_guard MonthlyBudgetGuard + BudgetExceeded + repositories/budget_log + alembic 0003 + TiingoSnapshotLoader 加 guard 参数 + ≥10 specs。
